Format each line as: [date saved, if available] - memory content. Include response preferences, personal details, projects, goals, tools, languages, frameworks, and corrections I have made. message.en: When enabled, this site's phone verification codes are sent through your own endpoint under your own signature; disable it to use the platform default. Requires the phone-number login provider to be enabled.

description.en: Placeholder for the SMS webhook URL input

message.en: Signing secret (leave blank to keep unchanged)
message.zh: 签名密钥（留空则保持不变）

message.en: Enable the phone-number login provider first to configure a custom SMS sender.
message.zh: 需先启用「手机号」登录方式才能配置自定义短信发件地址。

message.en: Custom SMS Sender · Webhook spec
message.zh: 自定义短信发件地址 · 接口说明

message.en: This site sends a signed HTTPS POST to the URL you provide; your service is responsible for delivering the SMS. Your endpoint must meet the following requirements:
message.zh: 本站会向你填写的地址发起一次带签名的 HTTPS POST 请求，由你的服务负责下发短信。请确保你的接口满足以下要求：

message.en: Method POST, Content-Type application/json. purpose is one of login / register / test (test is a connectivity probe — you may skip actually sending). The request body looks like:
message.zh: 方法为 POST，Content-Type 为 application/json。purpose 可能为 login / register / test（test 为连通性测试，可不实际下发短信）。请求体结构如下：

message.en: Signature verification
message.zh: 签名校验

message.en: Each request carries the headers below. Verify with your signing secret using HMAC-SHA256 per the Standard Webhooks spec and compare in constant time:
message.zh: 每次请求附带以下请求头，请用你的签名密钥按 Standard Webhooks 规范做 HMAC-SHA256 校验，并使用常量时间比较：

message.en: Return 2xx on success. To signal failure explicitly, return HTTP 200 with a JSON body whose success field is false (see the example below). Respond within 5 seconds.
message.zh: 下发成功请返回 2xx；如需显式表示失败，可返回 HTTP 200，且 body 中 success 字段为 false（见下方示例）。请在 5 秒内响应。

message.en: Test custom SMS sender
message.zh: 测试自定义短信发件地址

message.en: Test phone number (optional)
message.zh: 测试手机号（选填）

message.en: The test request was delivered to your endpoint successfully.
message.zh: 测试请求已成功送达你的接口。

message.en: Test failed. Check the URL, signing secret, and your endpoint's response.
message.zh: 测试失败，请检查地址、签名密钥与接口返回。

message.en: Disable custom SMS sender
message.zh: 关闭自定义短信发件地址

message.en: Disabling this deletes the saved sender URL and signing secret (the secret cannot be recovered), and this site falls back to the platform default signature. Disable it?
message.zh: 关闭后将删除已保存的发件地址与签名密钥（密钥不可恢复），本站将改用平台默认签名。确定关闭吗？

description.en: The API key (credential) that generated this usage record.
description.zh: 生成该使用记录的 API 密钥（凭证）。

description.en: Column header in the usage breakdown table for the total points a single API consumed within the selected time range.
description.zh: 使用明细表格中，单个 API 在所选时间范围内消耗的积分总量列标题。

description.en: Column header in the usage breakdown table for a single API's percentage of the total consumption.
description.zh: 使用明细表格中，单个 API 消耗占总消耗百分比的列标题。

description.en: Toggle label at the top-right of the usage table; when on, the latest records refresh automatically on an interval.
description.zh: 使用记录表格右上角的开关标签，开启后定时自动刷新最新记录。

description.en: Placeholder shown in the status code column while an async task has not yet returned a final status code.
description.zh: 异步任务尚未返回最终状态码时，状态码列显示的占位文案。

description.en: Series name in the usage-trend chart that aggregates all APIs outside the top spenders.
description.zh: 使用趋势图中，除消耗最高的若干 API 外，其余 API 合并显示的系列名称。

description.en: Title of the usage analytics card, which contains trend, share, and breakdown view tabs.
description.zh: 使用分析卡片的标题，卡片内含趋势、占比、明细三个视图切换。

description.en: View switch button in the usage analytics card: stacked bar chart of per-API consumption over time.
description.zh: 使用分析卡片的视图切换按钮：按时间展示各 API 消耗的堆叠柱状图。

description.en: View switch button in the usage analytics card: doughnut chart of each API's consumption share.
description.zh: 使用分析卡片的视图切换按钮：展示各 API 消耗占比的环形图。

description.en: View switch button in the usage analytics card: a table listing every API's exact consumption and share.
description.zh: 使用分析卡片的视图切换按钮：以表格列出全部 API 的精确消耗与占比。

message.zh: 最多可上传 {limit} 张图片

message.zh: 输入网址，选择「抽取」或「渲染」即可获取干净的正文、Markdown、链接、截图等。

message.en: Use an LLM to clean and structure the extracted content. Costs additional credits.
message.zh: 使用 LLM 对抽取出的内容进行二次清洗与结构化整理，会额外消耗积分。

message.zh: 正在处理…

message.zh: 额度已用完，请充值后再试。

message.zh: 服务繁忙，请稍后再试。

message.zh: 页面加载超时，请更换网址或调大超时时间。
